signals.title: OpenAI and PwC collaborate to reimagine the office of the CFO
signals.summary: OpenAI and PwC are partnering to help enterprises use AI agents to automate finance workflows, improve forecasting, strengthen controls, and modernize the CFO function.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI与普华永道合作推出AI代理，自动化企业财务流程，重塑CFO职能

signals.title: How OpenAI delivers low-latency voice AI at scale
signals.summary: How OpenAI rebuilt its WebRTC stack to power real-time Voice AI with low latency, global scale, and seamless conversational turn-taking.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI重构WebRTC技术栈，实现大规模低延迟实时语音AI交互

signals.title: Building the compute infrastructure for the Intelligence Age
signals.summary: OpenAI scales Stargate to build the compute infrastructure powering AGI, adding new data center capacity to meet growing AI demand.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI扩展Stargate项目建设AGI计算基础设施，新增数据中心满足AI需求增长

signals.title: Cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age
signals.summary: OpenAI outlines a five-part action plan for strengthening cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age, focused on democratizing AI-powered cyber defense and protecting critical systems.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI发布AI时代网络安全五步行动计划，推动AI赋能的网络防御民主化，保护关键系统安全

signals.title: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
signals.summary: OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI模型和代理服务登陆AWS，为企业提供安全AI开发环境，扩大AI服务入口

signals.title: The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership
signals.summary: OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.
signals.aiSummary: 微软与OpenAI修订合作协议，简化合作关系并增加长期确定性，支持大规模AI创新发展

signals.title: Our principles
signals.summary: Our mission is to ensure that AGI benefits all of humanity. Sam Altman shares five principles that guide our work.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI CEO阐述AGI发展五大原则，强调让人工通用智能惠及全人类的使命

signals.title: Introducing GPT-5.5
signals.summary: Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI发布GPT-5.5，性能大幅提升，支持编程研究数据分析等复杂任务

signals.title: GPT-5.5 System Card
signals.aiSummary: GPT-5.5系统卡片发布，标志着OpenAI新一代大模型技术突破，将推动AI应用入口变革

signals.title: TurboQuant: Redefining AI efficiency with extreme compression
signals.aiSummary: TurboQuant通过极致压缩技术重新定义AI效率，可能显著影响AI模型部署和入口应用
